Bolas.name: Bolas
Bolas.description:
Light

A weapon with this property is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when engaging in Double- or Two-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double- and Two-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Thrown (range 20/60)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Special

A Large or smaller creature hit by a bolas is entravé until it is freed. A bolas has no effect on formless or Huge or larger creatures. A creature can use its action to make a DD 13 test de Dextérité, freeing itpersonnelle or another creature within its reach on a success. The bolas has an AC of 10, 5 points de vie, and immunity to all dégâts not dealt by melee weapons. Destroying the bolas frees la créature without harming it and immediately ends the bolas's effects. While a creature is entravé by a bolas, you can make no further attacks with it.

Due to their unwieldy nature, bolas make ineffective melee weapons. Melee attack rolls made with them are made at disavantage.

Diresword.name: Diresword
Diresword.description:
Dexterity 11

A weapon with this property requires more skill to control. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Dexterity requirement.

Dire 1

Before you make a attaque d'arme with a weapon with the dire property, vous pouvez choisir to suffer a penalty to the attack roll up to the dire number. If you do so and you hit with it, you gain an equivalent bonus to the jet de dégâts.

Heavy

Quand vous contactez avec an attack roll using Strength with a weapon with this property, you deal additional dégâts equal to half your Strength modificateur (minimum of +1).

Disguised blade.name: Disguised blade
Disguised blade.description:
Disarming

When you score a critical hit with a weapon with the disarming property against a creature that is holding an object, you can attempt to disarm la cible (no action required). If la cible is no more than one size larger than you (your size or smaller if your weapon has the light property), it must succeed on a Strength jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus to attacks with the weapon) or it drops an object de votre choix at its mètres.

Disguised

You have avantage on Charisma (Deception) checks made to hide the nature of a weapon with this property.

Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Light

A weapon with this property is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when engaging in Double- or Two-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double- and Two-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Vibrospear.name: Vibrospear
Vibrospear.description:
Thrown (range 25/75)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Versatile ([[/r 2d4]])

A weapon with this property can be used with one or two hands. A dégâts value in parentheses appears with the property—the dégâts when the weapon is used with two hands to make a attaque au corps à corps.

Electrostaff.name: Electrostaff
Electrostaff.description:
Double ([[/r 1d6]] kinetic)

A weapon with this property can be used with one or two hands. A dégâts value in parentheses appears with the property—the dégâts when the weapon is used with Double-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Shocking 13

Quand vous contactez une créature with a weapon with the shocking property, you can force it to make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, DD equal to the shocking number. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes an additional [[/r 1d4]] lightning dégâts and becomes shocked until the end of its next turn.

Electrobaton.description:
Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Light

Vibrostiletto.name: Vibrostiletto
Vibrostiletto.description:
Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Keen 1

When you make a attaque d'arme with a weapon with the keen property, the critical hit range increases by an amount equal to the keen number.

Light

A weapon with this property is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when engaging in Double- or Two-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double- and Two-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Thrown (range 30/90)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Martial Arts.name: Martial Arts
Martial Arts.description:
Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Description

Monk: niveau 1

  • Your unarmed strikes and monk weapons gain the finesse property.
  • You can roll a [[/r d4]] in place of the normal dégâts of your unarmed strike or monk weapon. This die changes as you gain monk niveaus, as shown in the Martial Arts column of the monk table.
  • Quand vous utilisez l'action Attaquer with an unarmed strike or a monk weapon on your turn, you can make one unarmed strike as a action bonus.

Riot shocker.name: Riot shocker
Riot shocker.description:
Defensive 1

When you make your first attack on your turn with a weapon with the defensive property, vous pouvez choisir to suffer a penalty to attack and jet de dégâtss with that weapon up to the defensive number. If you do so, you gain the same bonus to AC. These effects last jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, as long as you're holding the weapon.

Light

A weapon with this property is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when engaging in Double- or Two-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double- and Two-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Shocking 13

Quand vous contactez une créature with a weapon with the shocking property, you can force it to make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, DD equal to the shocking number. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes an additional [[/r 1d4]] lightning dégâts and becomes shocked until the end of its next turn.

Chakram.name: Chakram
Chakram.description:
Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Returning

When you throw a weapon with this property, it automatically returns to your hand after the attack is complete, whether you hit or miss.

Thrown (range 30/90)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Vibroglaive.name: Vibroglaive
Vibroglaive.description:
Brutal 1

When you score a critical hit with a weapon with the brutal property, you roll a number of additional weapon dégâts dice equal to the brutal number.

Dexterity 13

A weapon with this property requires more skill to control. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Dexterity requirement.

Reach

A weapon with this property adds 5 mètres to your reach with it.

Two-handed

A weapon with this property requires two hands to use.

Echostaff.name: Echostaff
Echostaff.description:
Double ([[/r 1d6]] kinetic)

A weapon with this property can be used with one or two hands. A dégâts value in parentheses appears with the property—the dégâts when the weapon is used with Double-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Sonorous 13

Quand vous contactez une créature with a weapon with the sonorous property, you can force it to make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde, DD equal to the sonorous number. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes an additional [[/r 1d4]] sonic dégâts and becomes assourdi until the end of its next turn.

Vibrorapier.name: Vibrorapier
Vibrorapier.description:
Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Atlatl.name: Atlatl
Atlatl.description:
Disguised

You have avantage on Charisma (Deception) checks made to hide the nature of a weapon with this property.

Light

A weapon with this property is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when engaging in Double- or Two-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double- and Two-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Special

This specialized gungan club can be used to throw grenades or similar objects at long distances. If you are wielding this weapon, as part of the action to throw a grenade, you can instead throw it using an atlatl you are holding. The grenade can be thrown at a short distance of 30ft and a long distance of 120ft. When throwing a grenade at long range, creatures within the radius of the grenade's explosion have avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If you lack maîtrise in the atlatl, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

Vibrokatana.name: Vibrokatana
Vibrokatana.description:

Stun gauntlet.name: Stun gauntlet
Stun gauntlet.description:
Disruptive

When a creature is forced to make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde to maintain concentration due to taking dégâts from a weapon with the disruptive property, the DD for the check equals 10 or the full dégâts taken, whichever number is higher, instead of only half.

Fixed

A weapon with this property does not fill the hand, but you can't use the weapon while the hand is full. De plus, you have a +10 bonus to test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes to avoid being disarmed of this weapon.

Shocking 13

Quand vous contactez une créature with a weapon with the shocking property, you can force it to make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, DD equal to the shocking number. Doublesword.description:
Double ([[/r 1d8]] kinetic)

A weapon with this property can be used with one or two hands. A dégâts value in parentheses appears with the property—the dégâts when the weapon is used with Double-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Vibroknife.name: Vibroknife
Vibroknife.description:
Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Light

A weapon with this property is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when engaging in Double- or Two-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double- and Two-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Piercing 1

Before you make a attaque d'arme with a weapon with the piercing property, vous pouvez choisir to gain a bonus to the attack roll up to the piercing number. If you do so and you hit with it, you suffer an equivalent penalty to the jet de dégâts.

Vibroflail.name: Vibroflail
Vibroflail.description:
Dextérité 11

A une arme dotée de cette propriété nécessite plus de compétences pour être contrôlée. Lorsque vous l'utilisez, vous bénéficiez d'un désavantage aux jets d'attaque à moins que vous ne remplissiez les exigences de Dextérité.

Insouciant 1

Vibrotonfa.name: Vibrotonfa
Vibrotonfa.description:
Defensive 1

When you make your first attack on your turn with a weapon with the defensive property, vous pouvez choisir to suffer a penalty to attack and jet de dégâtss with that weapon up to the defensive number. If you do so, you gain the same bonus to AC. These effects last jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, as long as you're holding the weapon.

Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Light

A weapon with this property is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when engaging in Double- or Two-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double- and Two-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Vibrostaff.name: Vibrostaff
Vibrostaff.description:
Versatile ([[/r 2d4]])

A weapon with this property can be used with one or two hands. A dégâts value in parentheses appears with the property—the dégâts when the weapon is used with two hands to make a attaque au corps à corps.

Vibroknuckler.name: Vibroknuckler
Vibroknuckler.description:
Hidden

Vous avez un avantage sur les tests de Dextérité (Escamotage) effectués pour dissimuler une arme avec cette propriété.

Light

A l'arme avec cette propriété est petite et facile à manipuler, ce qui la rend idéale pour une utilisation lors de l'engagement avec une ou deux armes. Combattre. Voir les règles des combats à double et à deux armes au chapitre 9.

Neuronic whip.name: Neuronic whip
Neuronic whip.description:
Reach

A weapon with this property adds 5 mètres to your reach with it.

Shocking 15

Quand vous contactez une créature with a weapon with the shocking property, you can force it to make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, DD equal to the shocking number. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes an additional [[/r 1d4]] lightning dégâts and becomes shocked until the end of its next turn.

Special

specialized (shocking)

Vibrobattleaxe.name: Vibrobattleaxe
Vibrobattleaxe.description:
Brutal 1

When you score a critical hit with a weapon with the brutal property, you roll a number of additional weapon dégâts dice equal to the brutal number.

Dexterity 13

A weapon with this property requires more skill to control. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Dexterity requirement.

Heavy

Quand vous contactez avec an attack roll using Strength with a weapon with this property, you deal additional dégâts equal to half your Strength modificateur (minimum of +1).

Two-handed

A weapon with this property requires two hands to use.

Cesta.name: Cesta
Cesta.description:
Disguised

You have avantage on Charisma (Deception) checks made to hide the nature of a weapon with this property.

Double ([[/r 1d8]]) finesse

A weapon with this property can be used with one or two hands. A dégâts value in parentheses appears with the property—the dégâts when the weapon is used with Double-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Special

This specialized gungan staff can be used to throw grenades or similar objects at long distances. If you are wielding this weapon, as part of the action to throw a grenade, you can instead throw it using a cesta you are holding. The grenade can be thrown at a short distance of 60ft and a long distance of 240ft. When throwing a grenade at long range, creatures within the radius of the grenade's explosion have avantage on the jet de sauvegarde. If you lack maîtrise in the cesta, you must roll the dégâts dice twice and take the lesser total.

Vibroclaymore.name: Vibroclaymore
Vibroclaymore.description:
Dextérité 13

A une arme dotée de cette propriété nécessite plus de compétences pour être contrôlée. Lorsque vous l'utilisez, vous bénéficiez d'un désavantage aux jets d'attaque à moins que vous ne remplissiez les exigences de Dextérité.

À deux mains

Une arme dotée de cette propriété nécessite deux mains pour être utilisée.

Vibroshield.name: Vibroshield
Vibroshield.description:
Defensive 1

When you make your first attack on your turn with a weapon with the defensive property, vous pouvez choisir to suffer a penalty to attack and jet de dégâtss with that weapon up to the defensive number. If you do so, you gain the same bonus to AC. These effects last jusqu'au début de votre prochain tour, as long as you're holding the weapon.

Fixed

A weapon with this property does not fill the hand, but you can't use the weapon while the hand is full. De plus, you have a +10 bonus to test de caractéristiques and jet de sauvegardes to avoid being disarmed of this weapon.

Techaxe.name: Techaxe
Techaxe.description:
Light

A weapon with this property is small and easy to handle, making it ideal for use when engaging in Double- or Two-Weapon Fighting. See the rules for Double- and Two-Weapon Fighting in chapter 9.

Thrown (range 25/75)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Vibrohammer.name: Vibrohammer
Vibrohammer.description:
Heavy

Quand vous contactez avec an attack roll using Strength with a weapon with this property, you deal additional dégâts equal to half your Strength modificateur (minimum of +1).

Two-handed

A weapon with this property requires two hands to use.

Vicious 1

Whenever you deal dégâts with a weapon with the vicious property and roll the maximum on a weapon dégâts die, you gain a bonus to dégâts equal to the vicious number.

Mancatcher.name: Mancatcher
Mancatcher.description:
Reach

A weapon with this property adds 5 mètres to your reach with it.

Two-handed

A weapon with this property requires two hands to use.

Special

When you would make a Strength (Athletics) check to attempt to grapple a creature while wielding a weapon with the grappling property, you can instead make a attaque d'arme au corps à corps with it. If the attack hits, la créature becomes agrippé by you, and it takes dégâts equal to your Strength modificateur of the same type as the weapon's dégâts.

Electrovoulge.name: Electrovoulge
Electrovoulge.description:
Dexterity 13

A weapon with this property requires more skill to control. While wielding it, you have disavantage on attack rolls unless you meet the Dexterity requirement.

Reach

A weapon with this property adds 5 mètres to your reach with it.

Shocking 13

Quand vous contactez une créature with a weapon with the shocking property, you can force it to make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, DD equal to the shocking number. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes an additional [[/r 1d4]] lightning dégâts and becomes shocked until the end of its next turn.

Two-handed

A weapon with this property requires two hands to use.

Vibrodart.name: Vibrodart
Vibrodart.description:
Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Thrown (range 20/60)

A weapon that can be used to make a attaque à distance has this property. The range lists two numbers. The first is the weapon's normal range in mètres, and the second indicates the weapon's long range. When attacking a target beyond normal range, you have disavantage on the attack roll. You can't attack a target beyond the weapon's long range.

Special

Due to their diminutive size, vibrodarts make ineffective melee weapons. Melee attack rolls made with them are made at disavantage.

Disruptorshiv.name: Disruptorshiv
Disruptorshiv.description:
Disruptive

When a creature is forced to make a Constitution jet de sauvegarde to maintain concentration due to taking dégâts from a weapon with the disruptive property, the DD for the check equals 10 or the full dégâts taken, whichever number is higher, instead of only half.

Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Shocking 13

Quand vous contactez une créature with a weapon with the shocking property, you can force it to make a Dexterity jet de sauvegarde, DD equal to the shocking number. On a failed sauvegarde, la créature takes an additional [[/r 1d4]] lightning dégâts and becomes shocked until the end of its next turn.

Vibrocutter.name: Vibrocutter
Vibrocutter.description:
Heavy

Quand vous contactez avec an attack roll using Strength with a weapon with this property, you deal additional dégâts equal to half your Strength modificateur (minimum of +1).

Hooked vibroblade.name: Hooked vibroblade
Hooked vibroblade.description:
Disarming

When you score a critical hit with a weapon with the disarming property against a creature that is holding an object, you can attempt to disarm la cible (no action required). If la cible is no more than one size larger than you (your size or smaller if your weapon has the light property), it must succeed on a Strength jet de sauvegarde (DD = 8 + your bonus to attacks with the weapon) or it drops an object de votre choix at its mètres.

Finesse

When making an attack with a weapon with this property, you use your choice of your Strength or Dexterity modificateur for the attack and jet de dégâtss. You must use the same modificateur for both rolls.

Vibrosabre.name: Vibrosabre
Vibrosabre.description:
Dextérité 11

A une arme dotée de cette propriété nécessite plus de compétences pour être contrôlée. Lorsque vous l'utilisez, vous bénéficiez d'un désavantage aux jets d'attaque à moins que vous ne remplissiez les exigences de Dextérité.

Keen 1

Lorsque vous effectuez une attaque d'arme avec une arme avec la propriété vive, la portée du coup critique augmente d'un montant égal au nombre vif.

Light

A l'arme avec cette propriété est petite et facile à manipuler, ce qui le rend idéal pour une utilisation lors de combats à double ou à deux armes. Voir les règles des combats à double et à deux armes au chapitre 9.
